channel.title: GitHub Copilot Modernization on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in GitHub Copilot Modernization on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Azure Migrate – GitHub Copilot Modernization integration for at scale code assessments
item.description:
Azure Migrate public preview now integrates with GitHub Copilot Modernization to provide at-scale code insights. The integration combines Azure Migrate’s portfolio-level discovery and assessment with Copilot’s context-aware code analysis.

  • Source: Azure Updates
